actual_output:
Hello! 

Currently, I don't have live access to pull up your real-time ticketing queue (like Zendesk or Intercom) directly through this chat interface. 

However, if you paste the details of any pending tickets here, I would be more than happy to help you:
* Triage and categorize them by urgency
* Draft empathetic, step-by-step responses
* Determine if they need to be escalated

Just paste the ticket details whenever you're ready! How else can I support you today?
judge_reasoning: The chatbot accurately identified its current technical limitations regarding live data access while still offering to perform its core functions on any data the user provides.
